channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole by 254 old farm avenue, 3rd March
item.description:
Deep pothole yet again can feel damage to car tyres

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 3rd March
item.description:
Every time car goes over this can feel the cars tyres getting damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 246, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Laminated floor at leaning up against the side wall of 121 Bracondale Road, SE2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous crossing, 3rd March
item.description:
Road surface has significantly deteriorated presenting trip hazards at crossing. This could be a serious safety risk for those using the crossing including visitors who the o2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmund Halley Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside flats, 3rd March
item.description:
Large amount of rubbish dumped next to bin store
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 slabs o/s 15 -17 County Gate Eltham, 3rd March
item.description:
There are 4 broken slabs that are sticking up by about 2 inches and are really dangerous because if someone walks over them without looking they are going to have an accident. This has only just been noticed. Please can this be looked into with a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, County Gate, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single mattress dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
A single mattress has been dumped on the pavement just by the boundary between Limes Close and Arnos Court. It is the usual dumping spot - think it is someone from Arnos Court but never see anyone actually leaving stuff. The mattress is blocking the pavement - children walk along here to the school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Limes Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on outside wall of Energie fitness gym, 3rd March
item.description:
Graffiti on outside wall of Energie fitness gym

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 03/03/26 14:02 Please could you arrange for the following graffiti to be removed.... 1. On cable box in Elizabeth Way, BR5 4BJ at junction with High St.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Elizabeth Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the periphery of our property, 3rd March
item.description:
A door, palette and two drawers have been dumped on the periphery of our property. It is at the back of our house, adjacent to a public walk/drive-way. It appears that this has been building up in the last week and a half.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shipwright Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox on bank., 3rd March
item.description:
A dead fox is on the bank in view of a small bridge used on school run eg very young children.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 14 allington rd, 3rd March
item.description:
Dumped boards

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Debris left behind, 3rd March
item.description:
There is a footbridge that leads down from the A2 road into Hall Place. Around four or five months ago some workers did a great job replacing the railings long they path, it took them several weeks. Unfortunately now the job is finished the remaining materials they used have been left behind (see picture). Can you ask the contractors that performed this work to clear their debris from the site. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Way, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disposed of furniture, multiple flats above, 3rd March
item.description:
Health and Safety, fire hazard. Issue ongoing for several years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St James's Crescent, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on zigzag lines and double yellow lines outside oaktree school, 3rd March
item.description:
Parking on zigzag lines and double yellow lines outside oaktree school

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black cupboards/ furniture, 3rd March
item.description:
At back of bins for few weeks, needs moving
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trowbridge Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Household goods dumped on either side of the pathway down St John’s road Erith, 3rd March
item.description:
Dumped household goods on both pavements. St John’s road Erith DA8 1PE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Johns Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Fridge-freezer left on pavement., 3rd March
item.description:
This is causing an obstruction to anybody in a wheelchair or motorised buggies. Also the coolant is hazardous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Park Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Orpheus Street SE5, opposite entrance to Post Office. Non-offensive tags on 2 cabinets., 3rd March
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23b, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 03/03/26 13:53 Please can you get the following pot holes repaired.... 2. Outside 43, Leesons Hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
